scripts.render:competitor: npx remotion render --concurrency=1 src/index.ts CompetitorHook --output out/citelens-competitor-hook.mp4 --overwrite --gl=swiftshader "--chromium-flags=--no-sandbox"
scripts.render:taskbrief: npx remotion render --concurrency=1 src/index.ts TaskBriefDemo --output out/citelens-task-brief.mp4 --overwrite --gl=swiftshader "--chromium-flags=--no-sandbox"
scripts.render:score: npx remotion render --concurrency=1 src/index.ts ScoreReveal --output out/citelens-score-reveal.mp4 --overwrite --gl=swiftshader "--chromium-flags=--no-sandbox"
scripts.render:all: npm run render:competitor && npm run render:taskbrief && npm run render:score
